videos.title: Pegasus in 5 Minutes
videos.desc: Understanding the fundamentals of distributed computing on AWS and Clouds.

videos.title: Scaling AI Science with ACCESS Pegasus
videos.desc: A complete walkthrough of the Pegasus Workflow Management System concepts.

videos.title: OSG Training: Workflows with Pegasus
videos.desc: Covers basic principles of using the Pegasus Workflow Management System to manage workflows in the OSPool.

tutorials.title: 01: Quickstart
tutorials.desc: Your first abstract-to-executable workflow without worrying about underlying environments.

tutorials.title: 02: Managing Data
tutorials.desc: Learn about the Replica Catalog and how Pegasus automatically generates data transfer jobs.

tutorials.title: 03: Software Environments
tutorials.desc: Use the Transformation Catalog to map logical names to physical Apptainer/Docker containers.

tutorials.title: 04: Site Layout
tutorials.desc: Learn how Pegasus plans workflows across different compute sites and staging methodologies.

tutorials.title: 05: ML Training
tutorials.desc: Demonstrates training a machine learning model via distributed tasks in a Pegasus workflow.

tutorials.title: 06: ML Inference
tutorials.desc: How to load pre-trained machine learning models to run distributed inference securely.

tutorials.title: 07: Debugging & Stats
tutorials.desc: Master the pegasus-analyzer and statistics tools to track workflow failures and efficiency.

tutorials.title: 08: Provisioning
tutorials.desc: Dynamically provision resources using glideins and submit tasks using HTCondor Annex.

tutorials.title: 09: Shared Filesystem
tutorials.desc: Optimize workflows by leveraging a high-performance shared filesystem environment.

basics.title: Pegasus WMS API
basics.desc: Learn how to use the Pegasus WMS API to manage workflows programmatically.

basics.title: Diamond-WF Pattern
basics.desc: The standard Pegasus training pattern demonstrating complex task dependencies.

basics.title: Data Splitting
basics.desc: A fundamental training workflow focusing on input data partitioning.

advanced.title: Hierarchical Workflows
advanced.desc: Learn how to build workflows within workflows for massive scale operations.

advanced.title: Ensemble Manager
advanced.desc: Learn how to manage multiple workflow executions simultaneously.
